about.summary: I am Melapu Praveen Kumar, a B.Tech student in Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) at Nadimpalli Satyanarayana Raju Institute of Engineering & Technology (NSRIT) graduating in 2026. I have a strong passion for web development and modern digital technologies, building responsive, user-friendly, and performance-driven websites and web applications. I leverage AI-powered tools to optimize development and deliver high-quality, professional solutions.

projects.title: Restaurant POS System
projects.subtitle: QR-Based Ordering System
projects.description: A modern QR-code based ordering and restaurant Point of Sale (POS) system that streamlines the dining experience by allowing customers to scan, browse menus, and place orders directly from their tables.

projects.title: Online Snacks Store
projects.subtitle: E-Commerce Application
projects.description: An interactive e-commerce platform for snacks featuring a user-friendly frontend built with React and a robust backend powered by Django and SQLite, complete with user authentication and cart management.

projects.title: Online Food Delivery App
projects.subtitle: Web Application
projects.description: A responsive food delivery platform allowing users to browse menus, add items to cart, and experience a seamless, interactive food ordering user interface.

projects.title: To-Do List App
projects.subtitle: Web Application
projects.description: A clean and efficient task management application designed with a responsive UI to organize tasks, track progress, and persist user data locally using browser Local Storage.

projects.title: College Library Management System
projects.subtitle: Web Application
projects.description: A Django-powered library management system featuring student logins, automated book issue and return operations, admin controls, and late fee tracking to streamline library administration.

projects.title: Weather Web App
projects.subtitle: Web Application
projects.description: A clean and responsive weather forecasting web application integrated with Python Django that retrieves and displays real-time weather information based on city searches.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.subtitle: Interactive Game
projects.description: An interactive, fully responsive classic Tic Tac Toe game built using pure JavaScript, featuring sleek animations, score tracking, and smooth gameplay mechanics.

highlights: Worked with ESP32 & Arduino UNO microcontrollers
